description: Unlock the full potential of music: Stream effortlessly with one app! Musify is an app for streaming music. Its features include: * Online Song Search With Suggestions * Streaming Support * Offline listening Support * Import & Export Your Data And Never Lose It * Add Custom Playlists With Link * Optimized Sound Experience * Lyrics Support * No Ads * No Subscriptions * 17 Supported Languages * Material UI & Accent Colors & Dynamic Colors (Android 12+)
